mnemonics: Deterministic Finite Automata (DFA): Think of a single path
Nondeterministic Finite Automata (NFA): Think of multiple paths
Text Search: Look for a word in a sentence
Epsilon-Transitions: Think of a single step forward
keyPoints: Text Search: DFA can be used for substring search
Epsilon-Transitions: Allow for a single step forward
Apply Thompson's Construction: Convert NFA to DFA
